success
Clean implementation matching all acceptance criteria. Planning call correctly passes nil tools, emits the expected event triple (llm.request → llm.response → planning.turn) before the main loop, injects the plan as a wrapped assistant message, accumulates tokens, and degrades gracefully on failure.
